title: Extraction of Total Nucleic Acid from Environmental Samples
author: Dilip Abraham
materials: QIAamp Fast DNA stool Mini Kit
QIAamp Fast DNA stool Mini Kit Qiagen Catalog ##51604 Kit used

steps.title: For Moore swab samples
steps.instruction: For Moore swab samples: Add the cut membrane filter strips to 2ml Screw Cap Micro Tubes containing ~ 370 mg (one 2 ml eppendorf tube capful) of acid-washed glass beads.

steps.title: Include one extra tube for extraction...
steps.instruction: Include one extra tube for extraction blank (bead + InhibitEX buffer).

steps.title: Shake the tubes on a bead...
steps.instruction: Shake the tubes on a bead beater at maximum speed for 00:02:00

steps.title: Incubate the suspensions for 00:05:00 at 95 °C
steps.instruction: Incubate the suspensions for 00:05:00 at 95 °C

steps.title: Vortex for 00:00:15
steps.instruction: Vortex for 00:00:15 .

steps.title: Pipette 25 µL Proteinase K into...
steps.instruction: Pipette 25 µL Proteinase K into a new 2 mL microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Transfer ~ 600 µL of supernatant...
steps.instruction: Transfer ~ 600 µL of supernatant from step 9 into the 2 ml tube containing proteinase K.

steps.title: Add 600 µL of Buffer AL to the mix
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of Buffer AL to the mix. Do not add Proteinase K directly to the AL buffer.

steps.title: Vortex for 00:00:15
steps.instruction: Vortex for 00:00:15 . Mix thoroughly to form a homogeneous solution.

steps.title: Incubate at 70 °C for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 70 °C for 00:10:00 . Centrifuge briefly to remove drops from the inside of the tube lid.

steps.title: Add 600 µL of lysate from...
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of lysate from step 15 onto a QIAamp spin column (in a 2 ml collection tube) without moistening the rim. Close and label the cap.

steps.title: Place the QIAamp spin column in...
steps.instruction: Place the QIAamp spin column in a new 2 mL collection tube and repeat step 16 - 17 twice until all lysate (~ 1800 µL ) is passed through the spin column.

steps.title: Place the QIAamp spin column in...
steps.instruction: Place the QIAamp spin column in a new 2 mL collection tube and add 500 µL Buffer AW1.

steps.title: Place the QIAamp spin column in...
steps.instruction: Place the QIAamp spin column in a new 2 mL collection tube and add 500 µL Buffer AW2.

steps.title: Place the QIAamp spin column in a new 1
steps.instruction: Place the QIAamp spin column in a new 1.75 mL microcentrifuge tube, add 100 µL of Buffer ATE directly onto the QIAamp membrane.

steps.title: Place the QIAamp spin column in...
steps.instruction: Place the QIAamp spin column in a new 2 mL collection tube and centrifuge at full speed for 00:03:00 to eliminate the chance of possible Buffer AW2 carryover.

steps.title: Discard the spin column and save the filtrate containing TNA
steps.instruction: Discard the spin column and save the filtrate containing TNA.

steps.title: Aliquot 50 µL of extracted TNA into 1
steps.instruction: Aliquot 50 µL of extracted TNA into 1.75 mL screw cap tube and store at -80 °C for long term storage.

steps.title: The remaining 50 µL of eluate...
steps.instruction: The remaining 50 µL of eluate is stored at -80 °C and use for further analysis.

steps.title: Add600 μl of ethanol (96–100%) to...
steps.instruction: Add600 μl of ethanol (96–100%) to the lysate and mix by vortexing. Centrifuge briefly to remove drops from the inside of the tube lid.

steps.title: For samples processed by Nanotrap‱ A microbiome particles
steps.instruction: For samples processed by Nanotrap‱ A microbiome particles: Follow the steps described in the referenced protocol as described in the guidelines above.

steps.title: Add both extraction controls to the...
steps.instruction: Add both extraction controls to the tube, and then add 700 µL Inhibitex buffer.

steps.title: Centrifuge the samples at full speed...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the samples at full speed (approximately 20,000g) for 00:01:00 to pellet the particles.

steps.title: Centrifuge at full speed for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at full speed for 00:01:00 . Retain the spin column and discard the flow-through and collection tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at full speed for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at full speed for 00:01:00 . Retain the spin column and discard the flow-through and collection tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge at full speed for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at full speed for 00:03:00 . Retain the spin column and discard the flow-through and collection tube.

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 1 - 3 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 1 - 3 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge at full speed for 00:01:00 to elute the TNA
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at full speed for 00:01:00 to elute the TNA.

steps.title: For pellets derived from other wastewater...
steps.instruction: For pellets derived from other wastewater sample concentration methods: Resuspend the pellet in 3 mL of sterile PBS, and add 1ml of this suspension to 2ml Screw Cap Micro Tubes containing ~ 370 mg (one 2 ml eppendorf tube capful) of acid-washed glass beads.

steps.title: Add both extraction controls to the...
steps.instruction: Add both extraction controls to the tube, and then add 700 µL Inhibitex buffer.
